title: @godofprompt: Everyone's acting like Karpathy's LLM knowledge base is some PhD-level project. ...
rawContent:
Tweet by @godofprompt (God of Prompt)
Author bio: 🔑 Sharing AI Prompts, Tips & Tricks. The Biggest Collection of AI Prompts & Guides for ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Claude, & Midjourney AI → https://t.co/vwZZ2VSNil
Text: Everyone's acting like Karpathy's LLM knowledge base is some PhD-level project.  

It's 3 folders, 1 text file, and 30 minutes.  

I broke down the full system with copy-paste prompts for every step. 

And I told you where it breaks so you don't waste time finding out the hard way.
